title: osmanthus × fortunei
intro: Osmanthus × fortunei, also known as Fortune's Osmanthus, is a hybrid plant in the Osmanthus genus, resulting from the cross between Osmanthus heterophyllus and Osmanthus aurantiacus. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant possesses medicinal properties attributed to its fragrance and bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Osmanthus × fortunei include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues, improve mood, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Osmanthus × fortunei is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be employed in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
